posted_items.title: TCS CRAZY HIRING UPDATE! 🚀
bullets: TCS is planning to hire *40,000+ Freshers* this year bhayya! Big opportunity!
Skills focus: Java, Python, and *Cloud tech* fundamentals perfect ga nerchukondi.
Off-campus drives start avtunnai, prepare *strong portfolios* and resume right now.
Normal preparation saripodu, project highlights showcase cheyadame key!

posted_items.title: RESUME SHORTLIST HACK! 📄
bullets: Resume select avvatleda bhayya? Basic *ATS shortlisting mistakes* chestunnaru.
Include *measurable metrics* e.g., 'Optimized database query speed by 40%'.
Job description keywords carefully research chesi resume lo *highlight* cheyandi.
Response and shortlisting rates guaranteed *double avtayi* in 1 week!

posted_items.title: COLD EMAIL FOR JOBS! 📧
bullets: Apply-and-wait matrix nundi bayataki randi. Direct *Cold Emailing* to HRs try cheyandi.
Subject line absolute hook vundali, e.g., 'Free prototype for your home screen'.
Keep the email under *120 words* bhayya. Crisp, value-packed, and precise.
Follow-up scheduling correctly maintain cheyandi. Callbacks pichekkistai!

posted_items.title: INDIA TECH BOOM OR BUST?
bullets: Indian startup job market updates are changing rapidly.
Layoffs are happening, but AI startups are hiring engineers.
Make sure to follow emerging tech roles for freshers.

posted_items.title: INDIA TECH: NEXT LEVEL JOBS!
bullets: Indian tech industry is moving to the next level.
Hiring in space tech and e-commerce is on the rise.
AI engineering roles are opening up across startups.

posted_items.title: RESUME SHORTLISTING SECRETS!
bullets: Resume shortlisting hacks for freshers and startups.
Keywords are essential to bypass automated ATS filters.

posted_items.title: ISRO FREE COURSES! 🛰️
bullets: ISRO offering *Free Certified Courses* in Machine Learning & GIS modeling!
No application fees, direct classes from *ISRO Scientists* bhayya.
Any graduate can apply, but seats are *extremely limited* for students.
Resume lo certificate code add cheskunte profile value *next level highlights*!

posted_items.title: ATS HACKS: JOB CHALANGA!
bullets: Use custom keywords from the description in your resume.
Quantify your experience with clear metric highlights.
Target next level growth tips for freshers.

posted_items.title: AI IN TELUGU IS REAL! 🤖
bullets: India's own AI model *Krutrim* launches Telugu language support bhayya!
Ee tool direct ga *regional languages* lo clean codes write/debug chestundi.
Local startup founders & developers ki idi *massive advantage* to build fast.
Tech and language barriers complete break aypotunnai, leverage this tool!

posted_items.title: POWER UP YOUR LINKEDIN!
bullets: Mee profile pic *professional ga* vundali, background *clean* cheskondi.
Headline lo *dream role* and *top skills* clear ga mention cheyandi bhayya.
About section lo mee *story cheppandi*, achievements *quantify* cheyandi.
Daily *engage* avvandi, posts ki react avvandi, experts tho *connect* cheyandi.
posted_items.cta: LinkedIn Profile Checklist link in caption!

posted_items.title: ZOMATO 12 LPA HIRING! 🍔
bullets: Zomato starts recruiting *Associate Developers* with packages up to 12 LPA!
Primary requirements: *Golang & React* stack. Real-world projects are priority.
Technical evaluation strictly DSA and *System Design basics* logic tests.
Fast-paced startup environment and extreme growth. Apply right now!

posted_items.title: INTERVIEW STORYTELLING MASTERY!
bullets: Tech skills are great, kaani *soft skills* ni showcase cheyadam main bhayya.
STAR method use chesi *impactful stories* cheppandi, boring anipincharadu.
*Conflict resolution* and *teamwork skills* ni highlight chesi advantage theeskondi.
Interviewers will remember your *narratives*, not just your resume bullet points.

bullets: TCS is planning to hire *40,000+ Freshers* this year bhayya! Big opportunity!
Skills focus: Java, Python, and *Cloud tech* fundamentals perfect ga nerchukondi.
Off-campus drives start avtunnai, prepare *strong portfolios* and resume right now.
Normal preparation saripodu, project highlights showcase cheyadame key!

posted_items.title: VIRTUAL INTERVIEW HACKS!
bullets: *Background* clean ga vundali bhayya, lighting perfect ga check cheskondi.
*Mic* and *camera* quality chala important, low-cost options use chesi improve cheyandi.
Internet connection *stable* ga vundali, backup data ready ga pettukondi.
Body language and *eye contact* chala key bhayya, camera lo chudadam practice cheyandi.
